From: bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: Site A AD Migration — Progress Update
Date: March 6, 2026

Alice,

Quick update on the Active Directory migration preparation for Site A:

1. Domain Controller Staging: The two new DC servers at Site A have been
   racked, powered on, and joined to the test domain. Windows Server
   patching is complete (all critical patches as of March 1 applied).

2. Schema Extension Testing: The AD schema extension ran successfully
   in the test environment last night. No errors or attribute conflicts
   detected. Ready to promote to staging this weekend.

3. GPO Consolidation: I've reviewed the 47 legacy GPOs from Sites B and C.
   23 are duplicates that can be deleted. 24 unique GPOs will be migrated.
   The migration script is ready and has been reviewed by Dave Chen for
   security policy compliance.

4. Backup and Rollback: Full AD backup completed and verified on March 5.
   Rollback procedure tested successfully in lab — estimated rollback
   time is 45 minutes from Go-Live.

5. Next Steps: I will begin the production DC staging activities next
   week, targeting completion by March 14 to give us four days of buffer
   before the March 18 migration window.

Everything is on track on the AD side. The only dependency is the
network switch delivery — we need the Catalyst 9500s in place before
we can do final network connectivity testing for the DCs.

Bob Morrison
Technical Lead, AD Migration, NGIS Phase 3
